LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantCitizenship.descr: Mutants are accepted as full members of the community. Their altered bodies are no barrier to belonging so long as they stand with the colony.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantCitizenship.label: mutant citizenship
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantMasters.descripti: Mutants are seen as the natural overseers of the wastes. Their strength grants them the right to rule, especially over unmutated laborers kept beneath them.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantMasters.label: mutant masters
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantPurge.description: Mutants are treated as a stain on civilization. Their presence in the colony is dangerous, degrading, and should be stamped out wherever possible.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantPurge.label: mutant purge
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantSlaves.descriptio: Mutants are valued primarily as a slave caste. They are strong, dangerous, and best kept in chains where their labor can be exploited safely.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_MutantSlaves.label: mutant slaves
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_SecondClassMutants.desc: Mutants may remain inside society, but only in a lesser caste. They are useful when kept subordinate and put to work under firm supervision.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_Utobitha.description: A true mutant homeland should be built by mutants and for mutants. Baseline wastelanders are tolerated only as a problem, never as rightful members of the order being created.
LanguageData.Greenway_Precept_Utobitha.label: Utobitha
LanguageData.GauranlenConnection_Strong.description: Niềm tin mãnh liệt vào việc duy trì mối liên hệ chặt chẽ với Treefather, nguồn gốc của những người chăm sóc cây và quả.
LanguageData.TreeConnection.description: Niềm tin vào mối liên kết thiêng liêng giữa người thực dân và Treefather, một cái cây đột biến tạo ra những người chăm sóc cây và quả.
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.description: Travel to a remote destination using the Hellion. Unless you build a mooring mast, your current map and anything not on Hellion deck plating will be permanently lost. You will not be able to return.
LanguageData.GravshipLaunch.label: Hellion launch
LanguageData.AnimaTreeLinking.description: Link with the wise Mothman spirit through meditation and ritual.
LanguageData.AnimaTreeLinking.label: Mothman ritual
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowHonor.description: Issues a commendation to a worthy pawn.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowHonor.label: issue commendation
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowTitle.description: Commissions a government rank for a worthy pawn.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowTitle.label: commission rank
LanguageData.VFEE_ParadePrecept.label: presidential parade
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalAddress.description: Initiate a presidential address from the dais. {ORGANIZER_labelShort} is giving a presidential address from the dais. If all goes well, every ranked participant will gain a small amount of Votes, and {ORGANIZER_labelShort} will gain Votes for each ranked participant. If it goes poorly, the speech will cause social strain and {ORGANIZER_labelShort} will lose Votes for each ranked participant. The outcome depends on {ORGANIZER_labelShort}'s social abilities. Whitespring officials currently in the area will join the address and count as ranked participants.
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalAddress.label: presidential address
LanguageData.ThroneSpeech.description: Initiate a presidential address from the presidential chair. All colonists will come and listen. If it goes well, listeners will feel inspired, and gain respect for the speaker. If it goes poorly, the address will do social damage. The outcome depends on the speaker's social abilities.
LanguageData.ThroneSpeech.label: presidential address
